content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative self-feedback framework can be augmented by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives core to cutting-edge LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refinement framework that retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or external data while addressing its limitation of getting stuck in local feedback loops. This new hybrid system would leverage divergent perspective sampling at each iteration to break through flawed self-assessment biases that plague single-perspective refinement.
